zh.lifeSummary: 當Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon於大約1055年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧時，他的父親Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon22歲，母親Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable21歲。他和Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais至少有4個兒子。他去世於1101年12月16日在他的家鄉享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Craon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Krahn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerd, Gerhard, Hans, Hans-Peter, Horst, Irmgard, Mathias, Otto, Wilhelm, Willi.
German: nickname for a tall, slim long-legged person, from Middle Low German krane ‘crane’. Compare Kranich .

nameMeanings.name: Renaud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon was born about 1055, in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon, was 22 and his mother, Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable, was 21. He had at least 4 sons with Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais. He died on 16 December 1101, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon est né environ 1055, à Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais. Il est décédé le 16 décembre 1101, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon um 1055 in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon 22 und seine Mutter Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable 21. Er hatte mit Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 16. Dezember 1101 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon è nato il circa 1055 nel Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais. Morì il 16 dicembre 1101, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craonが約1055年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンクラオンで生まれた時，父Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craonは22歳，母Hawise 'Blanche' de Sableは21歳であった。彼はEnoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelaisとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1101年12月16日に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라
ko.lifeSummary: Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon(이)가 대략 1055년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1101년 12월 16일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon nasceu aproximadamente 1055, em Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais. Ele faleceu em 16 de dezembro de 1101, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Renaud I de Craon 2nd Lord of Craon родился около 1055 г. в местности краон, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Enoguen de Vitré, Dame de Châtillon-en-Vendelais. Он умер 16 декабря 1101 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.
